prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约11319名→11096名→12047名→11348名→12777名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025年基准位次约12777名，较2024年（11348名）后移约1429名，为近五年最大降幅，反映出当年报考热度有所回落；该校在北京市本科批招生计划持续扩增：2021年76人→2022年79人→2023年80人→2024年98人→2025年107人→2026年118人。2026年较2025年扩招11人（增幅约10.3%），连续多年扩招对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第76–77名（2026年排名第76位），属于中上游211层次，办学实力和行业认可度较高；2026年高考周期内学校声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类回应，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名未进入前100，关注度一般；2022年曾出现师德师风类偏负面事件，但距今较远影响已淡化；学校以矿业工程、安全科学与工程为特色，安全科学与工程为A+学科（第五轮学科评估），测绘科学与技术、地质资源与地质工程等学科实力突出，相关专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐；安全科学与工程类、测绘类等特色专业行业需求稳定。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年（65434人）大幅增加约29.7%，考生规模显著扩大将加剧整体竞争。省控线数据2026年缺失，；学校位于北京市（校本部所在地），属于本地高校，在京招生计划占比相对较高（2025年计划107人），本地考生报考意愿通常较强，地域偏好对位次有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划继续扩招（约10.3%）、北京市考生总数大幅增加（约29.7%）以及学校声誉稳定等因素：考生规模激增是2026年最关键的竞争加剧因素，其影响力度超过扩招带来的位次后移效应，预计最低录取位次将较2025年有所前移。预测2026年最低位次约13365名，位次区间12865–13865名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 安全科学与工程类（含安全工程、消防工程、应急技术与管理）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 新能源科学与工程
- 智能制造工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理、会计学、大数据管理与应用）
- 行政管理
- 英语（只招英语考生）
- 建筑学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约13365名，区间12865–13865名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报（安全科学与工程类、数学类、新能源科学与工程），一档专业（电气、计算机、人工智能）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（工商管理类、行政管理、英语）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<12865名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>13865名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 11319 → 11096 → 12047 → 11348 → 12777, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12777, which is about 1429 places behind 2024 (11348), the largest decline in five years, reflecting a decrease in application popularity that year. The university's undergraduate batch enrollment plan in Beijing has been continuously expanding: 76 in 2021 → 79 in 2022 → 80 in 2023 → 98 in 2024 → 107 in 2025 → 118 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 11 students (an increase of about 10.3%), and the continuous expansion over the years exerts downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at around 76–77 in recent years (ranked 76th in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with strong academic strength and high industry recognition. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management responses, with no major negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is not in the top 100, with average attention. In 2022, there was a somewhat negative incident related to teacher ethics, but it is far in the past and its impact has faded. The university is characterized by mining engineering and safety science and engineering, with safety science and engineering being an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), and strong disciplines such as surveying and mapping science and technology, and geological resources and geological engineering, with related majors highly recognized in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as electrical engineering and automation, computer science, electronic information/communication continue to be highly recommended with high social popularity. Specialized majors like safety science and engineering, surveying and mapping have stable industry demand. The total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% compared to 2025 (65,434), and the substantial expansion of the candidate scale will intensify overall competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. The university is located in Beijing (main campus location), a local university, with a relatively high proportion of enrollment plans in Beijing (107 in 2025), and local candidates usually have a strong willingness to apply, with regional preferences supporting rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the continued expansion of the 2026 plan (about 10.3%), the significant increase in the total number of Beijing candidates (about 29.7%), and the stable reputation of the university: the surge in candidate numbers is the most critical factor intensifying competition in 2026, with its impact exceeding the backward effect of rankings caused by expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 13,365, with a ranking range of 12,865–13,865.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Safety Science and Engineering (including Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Big Data Management and Application)
- Administrative Management
- English (only English candidates)
- Architecture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 13,365, range 12,865–13,865. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering, Mathematics, New Energy Science and Engineering) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Artificial Intelligence) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, Administrative Management, English) as safe backups. Candidates significantly above the upper limit of the range (<12,865) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the lower limit of the range (>13,865) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 backups.

_translation.university_name_en: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing)
